ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the branch belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alumni" (
  "alumni_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alumnus */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number of the alumnus */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of last update to the alumnus' profile */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the alumnus */,
  "father_name" TEXT /* Name of the alumnus' father */,
  "mother_name" TEXT /* Name of the alumnus' mother */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch the alumnus belongs to */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch the alumnus belongs to */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the degree earned by the alumnus */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the alumnus belongs to */,
  "present_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alumnus (e.g., self-employed, employed) */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the alumnus is currently working with */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the alumnus */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the alumnus */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the alumnus */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the alumnus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alumni_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alumni_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alumni_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event will be held */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being registered for */,
  "alumni_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alumnus registering for the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the alumnus (e.g., attended, not attended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_alumni_id FOREIGN KEY ("alumni_id") REFERENCES alumni ("alumni_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alumnus sending the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alumnus receiving the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES alumni ("alumni_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES alumni ("alumni_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the discussion forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discussion forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discussion forum the post belongs to */,
  "alumni_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alumnus who made the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_alumni_id FOREIGN KEY ("alumni_id") REFERENCES alumni ("alumni_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES discussion_forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post the comment belongs to */,
  "alumni_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alumnus who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_comments_alumni_id FOREIGN KEY ("alumni_id") REFERENCES alumni ("alumni_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES forum_posts ("post_id")
)
